reviews.comment:
Cargamos combustible, buena atención. Sanitarios muy limpios y atendidos. Posee un kiosco muy surtido. Hay restaurante.

(Translated by Google)
We filled up with fuel, and the service was good. The restrooms were very clean and well-maintained. There's a well-stocked convenience store and a restaurant.

reviews.comment:
Frenamos de paso a CABA para merendar algo y nos pedimos capucchino con tostadas. Mi recomendaciones es que pidan unas tostadas para 2 ya que son abundantes.

(Translated by Google)
We stopped on the way to Buenos Aires for a snack and ordered a cappuccino with toast. My recommendation is to order toast for two, as it's abundant.

reviews.comment:
Ibamos a Villa Gesell, paramos en la YPF, fuimos al baño y pudimos comer algo que llevamos de casa. Muy limpio los baños. Íbamos con 2 criaturas y pudimos llevarlos tranquilamente al sanitario.

(Translated by Google)
We were going to Villa Gesell, stopped at the YPF gas station, went to the bathroom, and were able to eat something we had brought from home. The bathrooms were very clean. We were with two children and were able to take them to the restroom without any problems.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/14840228736131746142/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUQtMlBlRllBEAE
